name: Amman
tagline: Ancient History, Warm Hospitality, and Surprising Affordability
description: Amman is a sprawling, hilly capital that bridges the ancient and modern Middle East. Built over Roman ruins and Nabataean trade routes, the city offers affordable living, excellent Arabic cuisine, warm Jordanian hospitality, and proximity to bucket-list sites like Petra, the Dead Sea, and Wadi Rum. Healthcare is strong and affordable by Western standards, and English is widely spoken in educated circles. While summers are hot and the city lacks coastal access, Amman rewards curious retirees with deep cultural richness and genuine value.

quickFacts.visa: Visa on arrival for US citizens (single entry); Jordan Pass includes visa and site entry
quickFacts.safetyRating: High – one of the safest capitals in the Middle East
quickFacts.climate: Arid Mediterranean with hot dry summers and cool wet winters

housing.description: 2BR apartment in Jabal Amman, Sweifieh, or a spacious flat in Tabarbour

dining.description: Falafel and hummus shops daily, mansaf dinners, casual restaurants 3-4x/week

healthcare.description: Affordable private insurance; Jordan's hospitals are well-regarded regionally

transportation.description: Taxis and ride-hailing (Careem); public transit is limited but taxis are cheap

entertainment.description: Roman Citadel visits, Rainbow Street cafes, Dead Sea day trips, souk exploring

1M.lifestyle: A 2-bedroom apartment in Jabal Amman or Sweifieh, eating falafel, hummus, and mansaf at local restaurants most days, and getting around by taxi and ride-hailing since public transit is limited. Affordable private health insurance covering Jordan's well-regarded hospitals. Day trips to the Dead Sea and Jerash are cheap. Comfortable and affordable, though dining at upscale restaurants and frequent travel would stretch the budget.

housing.description: Modern 3BR apartment in Abdoun, Deir Ghbar, or a villa flat in Dabouq with views

dining.description: Regular dining at Amman's best restaurants, mezze feasts, rooftop dinners, cafe culture

healthcare.description: Premium private insurance with access to top hospitals like Jordan Hospital and Khalidi

transportation.description: Own car for Dead Sea and desert trips; taxis for daily city use

entertainment.description: Petra weekends, Wadi Rum camping, Dead Sea spa days, cultural events, gym membership

2M.lifestyle: A modern 3-bedroom apartment in Abdoun or Deir Ghbar, dining out at good restaurants and mezze spots several times a week, and your own car for trips to the Dead Sea, Petra, and Wadi Rum. Premium private health insurance with specialist coverage. Weekend flights to Cairo, Beirut, or Istanbul are affordable. Day-to-day life is comfortable with a reasonable monthly cushion.

housing.description: Luxury 4BR villa in Abdoun or a premium apartment in the new Abdali district

dining.description: Fine dining at top restaurants like Fakhreldin and Sufra, private dinner experiences, wine imports

healthcare.description: Top-tier private insurance with international coverage and concierge service

transportation.description: Quality SUV for desert exploration, city car, occasional domestic flights to Aqaba

entertainment.description: Luxury Dead Sea resort weekends, private Petra tours, Wadi Rum glamping, regional travel

3M.lifestyle: A large villa in Abdoun or a premium apartment in the Abdali district. Regular dining at top restaurants like Fakhreldin and Sufra, an SUV for desert and Dead Sea trips, and flights to Aqaba. International health insurance with concierge service. Weekend trips to Wadi Rum tented camps and Dead Sea resorts are comfortable additions. This budget goes far in Amman, with significant margin each month.

housing.description: Grand villa in Abdoun or Dabouq with swimming pool, garden, and panoramic city views

dining.description: Personal chef for daily meals and entertaining, exclusive dining experiences, imported wines

healthcare.description: VIP private healthcare with international hospital network access and medical evacuation

transportation.description: Luxury SUV, second vehicle, full-time driver, first-class flights from Amman

entertainment.description: Private archaeological tours, luxury desert expeditions, Red Sea diving in Aqaba, cultural patronage

domesticHelp.description: Full-time housekeeper, cook, gardener, and security; live-in domestic help is affordable

luxuryExtras.description: First-class regional travel, luxury Dead Sea property access, antiquities study, philanthropy

5M.lifestyle: A large villa in Abdoun or Dabouq with pool and garden, a housekeeper, cook, and driver. A luxury SUV for desert trips, business class flights for international travel, and premium healthcare with international hospital access. Regular dining at Amman's best restaurants and private guided tours at Petra and other sites. Amman's moderate costs leave a large margin at this budget level.

housing.description: Palatial estate in Dabouq or Abdoun with extensive grounds, pool, and commanding views

dining.description: Personal chef team, private dining experiences, imported delicacies, lavish entertaining

healthcare.description: Top-tier international concierge medicine with global network and wellness programs

transportation.description: Multiple luxury vehicles, full-time driver, private aviation access, first-class international

entertainment.description: Private archaeological expeditions, luxury regional travel, art collecting, international events

domesticHelp.description: Full estate staff including chef, housekeepers, groundskeepers, security team, and drivers

luxuryExtras.description: Private jet access, Dead Sea luxury compound, archaeological philanthropy, international art

10M.lifestyle: A large estate in Dabouq or Abdoun with full household staff including a housekeeper, cook, drivers, and security. Multiple vehicles, first class international flights, and top-tier global health coverage. Dining at any restaurant in Jordan without a thought. This budget vastly exceeds Amman's cost of living, leaving the majority unspent. Most people at this level travel extensively and maintain Amman as a comfortable, affordable home base in the region.
